$comment: Pin for the upstream LiteLLM model_prices_and_context_window.json that scripts/bundle-litellm.mjs fetches at build time.
Bumping this is a deliberate, reviewable PR. The build refuses to run if the response SHA-256 doesn't match `expectedSha256`.
2. Set `commitSha` below to the full 40-char SHA
3. Run `node scripts/bundle-litellm.mjs --print-sha` to compute the new file's SHA-256
5. Run `npm run build` and inspect the diff in src/data/litellm-snapshot.json
